creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->lx

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gnome/2007-July/017923.html 

If scim causes GTK+2 applications crash, then it's scim bug. You should 
provide useful info by follow URL below to help other maintainer(s). 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
